name: Safety & Incidents
description: Datix-class safety & incident reporting — native Sparrow: near misses, hazards, patient safety overlay, CAPA, SLA routing, in-app notifications, executive exports, Cura safeguarding linkage.

changes: IR1-style incident fields (occurred/discovered times, location, witnesses, equipment, RIDDOR flag, reporter role, supplementary JSON) for NHS-style reporting alignment.
HSE walkaround templates with editable interval_days, JSON checklist, pending/overdue completion queue, optional link to an incident.
Safety & Incident Reporting v2 — admin command centre, incident workspace, portal wizard, safeguarding bridge, routing/SLA, Pareto analytics.
